verses.text: Kongpite-ah kongkhak ka bulh nailoh uh hangin, kulh ka cian' khitna uh leh a vang khat zong a om nawnlohna thu, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mi Geshem, leh ka gal dangte khempeuh un a zak uh ciangin
Sanballat leh Geshem zong Ono zanglei sunga om Hakkofirim khua-ah pai-in amaute tawh thu a kikum dingin hong sam uh hi. Hih pen kei hong suksiat nopna uh ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah kamtaite ka sawl a, “Tu laitakin nasep thupi ka nei hi; kong pai thei kei ding hi. Kei hong pai leng, kong pai sung ka omloh kalteng nasep kitawlnga ding hi,” ka ci hi
Amaute in tu-a bangmahin livei tak hong sam uh a, kei zong a livei mahin tu-a bangin ka dawngkik hi
Tua bangmahin Sanballat in a ngaveina hong sam a, tua tungtangin a kamtaipa in laikhak khat hong pia hi

A laikhak sungah, “Minam dangte lakah a kigen, Geshem in zong tu-a a kigen thu man hi, ci-a a gen thu in: Nang leh Jew mite in kumpi lehdo ding na sawm uh a, tua thu hangin kulh na ciang uh hi. Tua banah nangmahmah zong kumpi na utna kigen lai hi

Judah gam in kumpi khat nei ta hi, ci-in, nang kumpi na hihna thu Jerusalem-ah a taangko dingin kamsangte pawlkhat a koihin zong hong kigen hi. Kumpipa in hih thu za pelmawh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin thakhatin hong pai in la, hih thu kikum ni,” ci-in kigelh hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “Tu-a na gen bangin bangmah omlo hi. Tua bang thu pen nangma phuahtawm ahi hi,” ci-in ka thuk hi
Kote in ka hanciamna uh khiamin nasep a kizawhlohna ding deihna tawh amaute in kote hong lausak theihna ding uh a hanciam uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hahkat semsem zaw uh hi

Mehetabel' tapa Delaiah, a tapa Shemaiah a inn-ah omcip ahih manin ni khat ama kiangah ka pai leh amah in, “Pasian' inn sung, siangtho munah kituahin biakinn kong kikhaknelh ni; bang hang hiam cih leh nang hong that dingin amaute hong pai uh a, zanin amaute in nang hong that ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Ahih hangin keimah in, “Mi kei bangte tai ding ahi hiam? Mi kei bangte a suahtakna dingin biakinn sungah bu ding ahi hiam? Ka pai peuhmah kei ding hi,” ka ci hi

Tua ciangin a thusim ka phawkkhia hi. Pasian in tua bang thu a gen dingin amah a sawl hilo a, Tobiah leh Sanballat in tua bangin thugen dingin golhguk a na pia na hi a, ama thugenna pen keimah suksiat nopna ahi hi
Ama thugen bangin gamta-in mawhna ka bawl theihna dingin keimah hong lausakna dingin a kicial ahi hi. Tua bangin zuikha leng kei hong minsia sakin hong simmawh ding uh hi
Ka Pasian aw, amau' sepnate' hangin Tobiah leh Sanballat thei in la, keimah lausak dingin a hanciam kamsangnu Noadiah leh kamsang dang khempeuh zong thei in
Elul kha ni sawmnihlenga ni-in kulh kizo a, ni sawmngalenih sung hun bei hi
Ka galte un hih thu za-in, ka kiim uha om minam dangte in a theih uh ciangin lamdangsa a, kote' Pasian' huhna tawh hih nasep kizo ahihna a phawk uh hi
Hih hun sungteng khempeuh Jew uliante in Tobiah kiangah lai tampi khak uh a, Tobiah' laikhakte zong amaute' kiangah tung hi
Tobiah pen Arah' tapa Shekaniah' makpa hi a, ama tapa Jehohanan in Berekhiah' tapa Meshullam' tanute khat ten'pih ahih manin Judah gamsunga mi tampi amah tawh kipawl hi
Amaute in ama hoihnate zong keima zakah hong gen uh a, keima sepna teng zong ama kiangah na puak uh hi. Tua hi a, Tobiah in zong ka lau theihna dingin kei tungah lai tampi hong khak hi.
